query:
SELECT 
  pc.city_name,
  pc.partner_bank_name,
  pc.partner_bank_account,
  pc.partner_account_holder,
  p.account_name,
  p.bank_name,
  p.account_number
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partner_id = p.id
WHERE pc.city_name = '宁波';
